title: Extend two-step control function to panel setting
body: Extend Heckman two-step control function to panel setting with unit fixed effects. Cross-section identification is well known; extending to fixed-effects panel with strict exogeneity relaxed in T is open.
motivation: Graph gap: BankedTheorem panel_iv_v1 instantiates iv only in cross-section; no panel BankedTheorem instantiates it with FE. Insight angrist1990:i1 relies_on strict-exogeneity — relaxing this for panel suggests new design.
